task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Link' field labeled 'User Manual' has been added to the 'Default' product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Drupal 'Manage fields' screen for the 'Default' product type, there should be a row with the Label 'User Manual', Machine name 'field_user_manual', and Field type 'Link'.

task_completion.description: Verify the field is configured to allow external links only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field settings/configuration screen for the 'User Manual' field, the 'Allowed link type' radio button must be set to 'External links only'.

task_completion.description: Verify the field is configured with link text enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field settings/configuration screen for the 'User Manual' field, the 'Allow link text' setting must be enabled (set to either 'Optional' or 'Required').

task_completion.description: Verify the field is configured to be visible on the product display with an inline label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Manage display' screen for the 'Default' product type, the 'User Manual' field must be placed in an active region (not under 'Disabled'), and its 'Label' dropdown must be set to 'Inline'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'User Manual' field is populated with the correct URL and link text on the product edit form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the edit page for the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' product, the 'User Manual' field inputs should show the URL 'https://www.sony.com/electronics/support/wireless-headphones-bluetooth-headphones/wh-1000xm5/manuals' and the Link text 'Official PDF Manual'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'User Manual' link is visible and correctly formatted on the actual product page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the public-facing product page for the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones', there should be an inline label 'User Manual:' followed by a clickable link reading 'Official PDF Manual' that points to the specified Sony URL.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Drupal admin UI rather than just running terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Drupal administrative interface (e.g., Manage fields, Manage display, Product edit forms) and interacting with web forms.

integrity.description: Verify the final product page is genuinely rendered by Drupal and not a static HTML mock-up.
integrity.visual_evidence: The product page should include standard Drupal Commerce elements (header, tabs, standard theme styling) consistent with a real Drupal site, rather than a locally edited HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the link was added via the content entry form, not by hardcoding it into a Twig template.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the filled-out product edit form showing the URL and Link Text in the standard Drupal field widgets, proving the data is stored in the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The field machine name must be exactly 'field_user_manual'. The target product is 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5). The expected link text is 'Official PDF Manual' and the expected URL is 'https://www.sony.com/electronics/support/wireless-headphones-bluetooth-headphones/wh-1000xm5/manuals'.
